creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
I found it on my old installation of FreeBSD 13.3,but it does not work on FreeBSD 14 :

[root@marietto /mnt/zroot-133/var/cache/pkg]==> pkg add wine-7.0.2_2,1.pkg

Installing wine-7.0.2_2,1...
pkg: wrong architecture: FreeBSD:13:amd64 instead of FreeBSD:14:amd64

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): wine-7.0.2_2,1.pkg
